understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through levels by moving selectable pieces onto all goal tiles marked '+' simultaneously to achieve WIN for each level and complete the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: CLICK on a position moves the currently selected piece toward it if path is clear and not blocked; pieces move between accessible positions like [9,21] and [18,21]; clicking the same position repeatedly causes no movement if blocked; other pieces can be selected by clicking them; walls and obstacles block movement; step budget decreases per action, ending run when depleted.
